perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair stands in a Costco warehouse, holding a plastic container of colorful cherry tomatoes. She points at the label and then to the side. (2) The scene transitions to an indoor dining area where two women, one wearing a black top and the other a white lace top with a black beret, sit at a table. They are holding up the cherry tomatoes, smiling, and performing a synchronized pose. (3) Close-up shots of the tomatoes in a bowl and the women eating them, showing facial expressions of enjoyment and giving thumbs up. They compare different colors of the tomatoes by holding them next to each other.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music begins. A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice narrates, introducing the 'Canada colorful cherry tomatoes' found at Costco. (2) The music continues at a steady volume as the narrator describes the price discount and the physical characteristics of the tomatoes. (3) The audio shifts to a dialogue-style recording where the women's voices are heard commenting on the taste, crunchiness, and acidity of the fruit compared to local Taiwanese varieties. Cheerful sound effects (like a 'ding' or pop) occur during specific points of emphasis.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. Hook Text: '隱藏優惠' (Hidden Discount) in a yellow bubble. Main Title: '加拿大彩色小番茄' (Canada Colorful Cherry Tomatoes) in large, colorful Chinese characters. (2) Functional Text: '原價299 現在只要197' (Original price 299, now only 197) indicating the discount. (3) Decorative/Effect Text: Subtitles translate the dialogue, such as '皮比較薄' (Skin is thinner) and '甜度比較高' (Sweetness is higher), accompanied by emotional stickers like a thumbs-up icon.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at retail store -> Tasting and comparison at home -> Final recommendation.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long straight black hair wearing a black cold-shoulder top; the second woman has short hair and wears a black beret with a white lace shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene is a Costco warehouse aisle with industrial shelving and cardboard boxes of produce. Second scene is a modern home dining area with white walls and a kitchen counter visible.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lifestyle recommendation and product review. It captures the viewer's attention with a 'hidden discount' at a popular retail chain (Costco) and provides a detailed sensory comparison between imported Canadian tomatoes and local Taiwanese ones to justify the purchase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Directly showcasing the product packaging, mentioning the price discount, and providing a positive review of the taste.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density colorful text overlays and fast-paced narration typical of Taiwanese 'good-find' influencers.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses beat-sync editing where scene cuts align with the BGM rhythm, enhancing viewer engagement for short-form content.
